prediction_reason.历年位次与招生计划: 2023年最低位次约33名，2024年约30名，2025年约30名，近三年位次稳定在30名左右，波动极小，显示北京大学在新疆理科的录取位次高度稳定；2021–2024年理科计划均为12人，2025年扩至15人，2026年进一步扩至18人，连续两年扩招，2026年较2025年扩招20%，招生名额增加有助于缓解竞争压力。
prediction_reason.学校层次与声誉: 985、211、双一流，软科主榜全国第2名（2021–2026年连续稳定），中国顶尖学府，对高分考生吸引力极强；2026年声誉评价偏负面，主要涉及校园安全 及食堂宿舍等管理问题；但抖音综合热度排名第3（高热），短视频曝光量极大，报考关注度持续高位；2025年湖北提前批首次出现招生空档，但属个别省份现象，对新疆影响有 限；北京大学拥有A+学科数量全国领先，涵盖数学、物理学、化学、生物学、计算机科学与技术、法学、经济学、中国语言文学、哲学等30余个A+学科，学科实 力对顶尖考生吸引力极强。
prediction_reason.专业热度与地域: 计算机类、电子信息/通信、电气工程等专业持续高热推荐，临床医学、口腔医学保持偏热，法学分化观望；新疆2025年理科 考生约52538人，2026年总考生约238000人，按近年理科占比约68.6%估算，2026年理科考生约16.3万人，较2025年大幅增长约3倍，竞争显著加剧；北京大学位于北京，对新疆考生具有跨省吸引力；该校在新疆招生占比极小（约0.015），属全国性招生，地域偏好对位次影响有限。
prediction_reason.预测结论: 综合2 025年基准位次30名、2026年理科计划扩招20%（使位次数字增大）与新疆理科考生总量大幅增长约3倍（使位次数字减小）两股相反力量，考生暴增带来的竞争加剧效应显著超过 扩招的缓解作用，预计2026年最低录取位次小幅前移至约29名，区间19–39名。

major_tier_recommendation.overall_advice: 位次在预测区间19–39名内，建议以二档专业为主力、一档专业为冲刺、三档专业为保底。位次明显优于区间下限（≤19名）可重点冲击一档王牌专业（元培、数学、工商管理）；位次接近区间上限（≥39名）建议优先选择三档中计算机类等高热推荐专业。

历年位次与招生计划.title: Historical Rankings and Enrollment Plans
历年位次与招生计划.text: The minimum ranking in 2023 was approximately 33, in 2024 approximately 30, and in 2025 approximately 30. Rankings over the past three years have been stable around 30, with minimal fluctuation, indicating a highly stable admission ranking for Peking University in Xinjiang Science. From 2021 to 2024, the science enrollment plan was 12 each year. In 2025, it expanded to 15, and in 2026 further expanded to 18. With two consecutive years of expansion, the 2026 plan represents a 20% increase over 2025, and the increase in enrollment slots helps alleviate competition pressure.

学校层次与声誉.title: School Level and Reputation
学校层次与声誉.text: 985, 211, Double First-Class, ranked 2nd nationally on the Soft Science Main Ranking (stable from 2021 to 2026), a top Chinese institution with extremely strong appeal to high-scoring students. In 2026, reputation evaluation is somewhat negative, mainly involving campus safety and dormitory management issues. However, Douyin comprehensive popularity ranking is 3rd (high heat), with extremely high short video exposure, and application attention remains high. In 2025, Hubei early batch saw a first-time enrollment gap, but this is an isolated provincial phenomenon with limited impact on Xinjiang. Peking University has a national leading number of A+ disciplines, covering over 30 A+ disciplines including Mathematics, Physics, Chemistry, Biology, Computer Science and Technology, Law, Economics, Chinese Language and Literature, Philosophy, etc., and its disciplinary strength is extremely attractive to top students.

专业热度与地域.title: Major Popularity and Region
专业热度与地域.text: Majors such as Computer Science, Electronic Information/Communication, and Electrical Engineering continue to be highly recommended. Clinical Medicine and Stomatology remain relatively popular, while Law is divided and under observation. In 2025, Xinjiang science examinees numbered approximately 52,538. In 2026, total examinees are about 238,000. Estimated at about 68.6% science proportion in recent years, the 2026 science examinees are about 163,000, a significant increase of about 3 times compared to 2025, intensifying competition. Peking University is located in Beijing, offering cross-provincial appeal to Xinjiang students. Its enrollment proportion in Xinjiang is extremely small (about 0.015%), and it is a nationwide enrollment, so regional preference has limited impact on rankings.

预测结论.title: Prediction Conclusion
预测结论.text: Combining the 2025 baseline ranking of 30, the 2026 science enrollment plan expansion of 20% (which increases the ranking number), and the massive increase in Xinjiang science examinees by about 3 times (which decreases the ranking number), the competition intensification effect from the surge in examinees significantly outweighs the mitigating effect of the expansion. It is predicted that the minimum admission ranking in 2026 will slightly move forward to about 29, with a range of 19–39.

major_tier_recommendation_en.overall_advice: For rankings within the predicted range of 19–39, it is recommended to focus on Tier 2 majors as the main force, Tier 1 majors as a sprint, and Tier 3 majors as a safety net. If the ranking is significantly better than the lower limit (≤19), prioritize sprinting for Tier 1 flagship majors (Yuanpei, Mathematics, Business Administration). If the ranking is close to the upper limit (≥39), it is advisable to prioritize Tier 3 majors such as Computer Science, which are highly recommended.

历年位次与招生计划.title: Historical Rankings and Enrollment Plan
历年位次与招生计划.text: The minimum ranking in 2024 was approximately 32nd, and in 2025 it was about 17th, with a significant forward shift of 15 places in one year, indicating a clear increase in application popularity; the liberal arts enrollment plan from 2021 to 2026 is consistently 16 students, remaining completely unchanged for six consecutive years, with no direct supply-demand impact on rankings.

学校层次与声誉.title: University Level and Reputation
学校层次与声誉.text: 985, 211, Double First-Class, ranked 2nd nationally on the Soft Science main list, a top comprehensive university in China, with liberal arts strength on par with sciences, extremely attractive to high-scoring liberal arts candidates; the reputation evaluation in 2026 is somewhat negative, but the overall Douyin popularity ranking is 3rd (high heat), with massive short video exposure; in 2025, Hubei's early batch saw a first-time enrollment gap, but this is an isolated provincial phenomenon with limited impact on Xinjiang; Peking University's liberal arts advantage disciplines lead nationally: Chinese Language and Literature A+, Philosophy A+, Law A+, Sociology A+, Chinese History A+, Archaeology A+, Theoretical Economics A+, Applied Economics A+, Business Administration A+, Journalism and Communication A-, etc., strongly attracting top liberal arts candidates.

专业热度与地域.title: Major Popularity and Region
专业热度与地域.text: Law: wait-and-see divergence; Chinese Language/Literature: recommended; Education/Teaching: wait-and-see divergence; Journalism and Communication: clearly discouraged; Xinjiang's 2025 liberal arts candidates approximately 24,010, total candidates in 2026 about 238,000, estimated liberal arts proportion around 31.4%, so 2026 liberal arts candidates about 75,000, a roughly threefold increase from 2025, significantly intensifying competition; Peking University is located in Beijing, offering cross-provincial appeal to Xinjiang liberal arts candidates; its enrollment share in Xinjiang is very small, being national enrollment, so regional preference has limited impact on rankings.

预测结论.title: Prediction Conclusion
预测结论.text: Combining the 2025 baseline ranking of 17th, the unchanged 2026 liberal arts plan (no supply-demand impact), and the roughly threefold increase in Xinjiang liberal arts candidates (which reduces the ranking number), the intensified competition from the surge in candidates is significant. The minimum admission ranking in 2026 is expected to continue moving forward to approximately 14th, with a range of 4–24.
